openGraph.title: Find My IP Address
openGraph.ogTitle: Find My Public IP Address - Location, ISP & Port Info
openGraph.description: Instantly look up your public IP address along with detailed location (country, city, coordinates), ISP, ASN, hostname, proxy detection, and a common port scanner.

title: Find My IP
description: Check your public IP address with full location, network details, and port scan.

hero.label: Your Public IP Address
hero.error: Could not retrieve your IP address.

map.title: Approximate Location
map.notice: IP-based location estimate — may differ from actual location.

portScan.idle: Click 'Start Port Scan' to check common ports on your IP.
portScan.scanning: Scanning ports… (may take up to a minute)
portScan.notice: Most ports will appear closed or filtered for home IPs behind a NAT or firewall.

disclaimer: Location data is an IP-based estimate and may differ from your actual location. Port scan results depend on your router and firewall configuration.
